title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY trading near 158.86, approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: Fed-ECB 175bp differential weighs on EUR/USD — pair holds at 1.1797; rate divergence favours USD.

title: AUD/USD
text: RBA hiking rates — AUD carry supported; AUD/USD consolidating above 0.7128.

title: VIX
text: VIX at 18.4 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.15%.

title: USD/JPY vs VIX
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break: JPY no longer acting as safe haven; USD/JPY correlation with VIX at +0.680, z=+1.38σ.
